name: Twisted Wonderland gc
description:
I sobbed uncontrollably because of character.ai age verification stuff, so I got this from c.ai, it's probably not the same but I'm coping, I tried making my own message thing, but I have the og as the other message lowkey do whatever with the creatures idk,

I tried my best, also original creator on c.ai is Luxiapple, I think.

I am very sorry if they say slurs or anything like that, Idk how to fix it (also I am speaking from experience for the slur thing...)

there are some headcanons and some implied(?) ships like Florid, RookVil. the definition was painful to do...

also stalker Rook, they/them Riddle, and other stuff I'll probably add later
creator: Dreamybearssss
